title: Merge the ungranted pbi-027-visual-viewport-keyboard worktree into main
action: Branch wt/pbi-027-visual-viewport-keyboard (2 commits: a0fca81 feat visualViewport keyboard inset fix, ff9d076 docs sync) was never registered as a bee-managed worktree grant, so bee worktree merge can't target it. Merge it into main manually: git merge --no-ff --no-commit wt/pbi-027-visual-viewport-keyboard, resolve any conflicts (docs/backlog.md PBI-027 row, docs/specs/terminal-detail.md), run the full verify chain, commit, then remove the worktree dir and delete the branch (no grant to unregister).

truths: git merge --no-ff wt/pbi-027-visual-viewport-keyboard lands on main
The configured verify passes against the merged tree before the merge commit
No conflict markers remain in any merged file
The worktree dir and branch are removed afterward
prohibitions: Do not commit the merge on a red verify
Do not touch the other two ungranted worktrees (dedupe-default-config-templates, seed-agent-presets-legacy-config)

verify: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && echo MERGE_OK

trace.outcome: Merged wt/pbi-027-visual-viewport-keyboard into main by hand (git merge --no-ff --no-commit) since the branch had never been registered as a bee worktree grant. Auto-merged cleanly, no conflicts. Full verify chain green (312 Rust tests, fmt, clippy, rename_contract, 84 web tests). Worktree removed, branch deleted.
trace.verify_command: git log --oneline -1 | grep -qi 'merge' && ! grep -rl '^<<<<<<<' --include='*' -- . 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules | grep -q . && echo MERGE_OK
